character.name: Late-20s Polish human male junior lawyer (aplikant adwokacki), sturdy compact build, short cropped MID-BROWN hair (warm brown, NOT black, NOT blonde), square jaw, narrow watchful observant eyes, rumpled dark navy suit jacket with sleeves pushed up the forearms, white dress shirt with deep oxblood tie loose at the collar (NOT carefully tied — informal investigator-mode register), dark trousers, deadpan expression, hands at sides with a small notebook clipped to his belt, full body, 16-bit JRPG, pallette: #6a4a30, #e6b08a, #1c2a40, #e8e4d8, #7a1f2a, #0d0a08
